parents.subject: LU-10973 lutf: use configured tmp directory for tar

commit.subject: LU-10973 lutf: Fix python version
commit.message:
LU-10973 lutf: Fix python version

Use the correct version of python in compile time.
The PYTHON environment variable is set during build time and
should be used whenever executing python scripts

Pass the PYTHONPATH to the agents.

Add the master only once to the agent list.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Amir Shehata <ashehata@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I472c4ab3d9318d63ada66b4789286ea342221fe0
